title: Build a Student Manager
description: Practice arrays and objects by building a student manager. Complete multiple exercises that all use the same core skill: managing a collection of data.

blocks.content:
In this activity, you'll practice **managing collections of data** by building a student manager system. Each exercise below focuses on the same core skill—storing and manipulating information about multiple students—but in different ways.

**Learning Goal**: Master how to create arrays of objects, loop through them, and manipulate the data.

Start with **Exercise 1** below and work your way through all exercises. Each one repeats the same concept in a new context!

Start by creating an array of student objects and displaying them. Each student should have: `name`, `grade`, and `gpa`.

**Goal**: Practice creating arrays of objects and accessing their properties.

blocks.title: Exercise 1: Create and Display Students

blocks.content:
Use the same student data, but now **filter** to find all students in a specific grade.

**Goal**: Practice filtering arrays of objects based on a condition.

blocks.title: Exercise 2: Find Students by Grade

blocks.content:
Practice **modifying** the student list by adding and removing students.

**Goal**: Practice using array methods (push, pop, shift, splice) on arrays of objects.

blocks.title: Exercise 3: Add and Remove Students

blocks.content:
Now use the student data to **calculate statistics** about the class.

**Goal**: Practice working with arrays of objects to extract and compute values.

blocks.title: Exercise 4: Calculate Class Statistics

blocks.content:
Combine searching and updating: **find a student and update their information**.

**Goal**: Practice finding specific objects in an array and modifying them.

blocks.title: Exercise 5: Search and Update Students

blocks.content: Ready for the final challenge? Combine all the skills from exercises 1-5 into one complete system!

blocks.title: Challenge: Student Manager System

blocks.content:
## Great Job! 🎉

You've completed all exercises! You've now practiced **managing collections of data** using:
- Creating arrays of objects
- Looping through data
- Filtering and searching
- Adding and removing items
- Calculating statistics
- Updating values

These are the core skills you'll use when working with real data in JavaScript. Practice these patterns and you'll be ready for anything!
